settings.signInRequired: Please sign in to manage your two-factor authentication settings.
settings.totp.heading: Authenticator app (TOTP)
settings.totp.statusNotEnrolled: Not set up. Add an authenticator app as a second factor.
settings.totp.disablePrompt: Enter a current code from your authenticator app to turn it off.
settings.totp.regeneratePrompt: Enter a current code from your authenticator app to generate a new set of backup codes. Your old codes stop working.
settings.totp.reenrollPrompt: Enter a current code from your authenticator app to set up a new one. Your current authenticator stops working.
settings.webauthn.heading: Security keys & passkeys
settings.webauthn.removeConfirm: Remove the passkey "{{name}}"? You will no longer be able to sign in with it.
settings.email.heading: Email code
settings.email.notConfigured: No email address on your account, so email codes are unavailable.
settings.email.managedInProfile: Your email address is managed in your account profile.
reset.request.lostAccess: Lost access to your second factor?
reset.request.prompt: If you can no longer use any of your second factors, you can ask an administrator to reset your two-factor authentication.
reset.request.confirmation: If your account is eligible, an administrator has been notified and will be in touch. You can close this page.
login.title: Sign in
fatal.title: Sign-in problem
network_error: Could not reach the server. Check your connection and try again.
prepare.rate_limit_exceeded: Too many requests. Please wait {{nextRetryInSeconds}} seconds and try again.
no_active_session: No active session found. Please refresh the page and retry login again.
suspended_user: Your account is temporarily locked for {{suspensionDurationInHours}} hour(s). Please retry later.
failed_to_check_if_user_suspended: Failed to check if the user is suspended
failed_to_mark_user_as_suspended: Failed to mark user as suspended
verify.verification_failed: Incorrect code. Please double-check the digits and try again.
factor.totp.invalid_code: Invalid code. Double-check the digits and try again.
factor.totp.locked_out: Too many failed attempts. Please try again later.
factor.totp.not_enrolled: Two-factor authentication is not configured for this account.
factor.totp.not_authenticated: Authentication required. Please sign in again.
factor.totp.internal_error: An internal error occurred. Please try again.
factor.totp.useAuthenticatorCode: Use the authenticator app code instead
factor.totp.enrollment_required: Two-factor authentication is required. Set it up below to finish signing in.
factor.webauthn.title: Security key / passkey
factor.webauthn.help: Use your registered security key, fingerprint, or saved passkey to finish signing in.
factor.webauthn.cancelled: Authentication was cancelled or timed out. Please try again.
factor.webauthn.verification_failed: Could not verify your authenticator. Please try again.
factor.webauthn.registration_required: A second factor is required. Set one up below to finish signing in.
factor.webauthn.unsupported: This browser does not support WebAuthn. Use a recent Chrome, Edge, Firefox or Safari, or choose another method.
factor.email_code.title: Email verification
factor.email_code.resent: A new code has been sent to {{maskedEmail}}.
factor.email_code.verification_code_has_: A verification code has been sent to <mark>{{maskedEmail}}</mark>.
factor.email_code.missing_prepared_code: No verification code found. Please request a new code.
factor.email_code.preparation_failed: Failed to prepare email factor for user: {{user}}
factor.email_code.email_not_configured_f: User '{{user}}' does not have an email address configured.
factorChooser.title: Choose a verification method
factorChooser.description: Several methods are available. Pick the one you want to use to finish signing in.
enroll.chooser.title: Set up two-factor authentication
enroll.chooser.description: Your account must be protected by a second factor. Choose the method you want to set up to finish signing in.
enroll.totp.title: Set up your authenticator app
enroll.totp.scan: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app (e.g. Google Authenticator, 1Password).
enroll.totp.qrAlt: QR code to scan with your authenticator app. If you cannot scan it, enter the secret shown below manually.
enroll.totp.codeLabel: Then enter the 6-digit code your app is currently showing:
enroll.totp.backupWarning: Save these codes somewhere safe. Each can be used only once and they will not be shown again.
enroll.totp.backupAck: I have saved my backup codes - continue signing in
enroll.totp.copied: Backup codes copied to the clipboard.
enroll.webauthn.title: Register a security key or passkey
enroll.webauthn.help: Your browser will ask you to use a security key, your fingerprint/face, or a saved passkey. You will then confirm it once to finish signing in.
enroll.webauthn.failed: Could not register your authenticator. Please try again.
factor.totp.force_not_allowed: Re-enrollment is not allowed here. Please sign in first.
factor.webauthn.locked_out: Too many failed attempts. Please try again later.
factor.webauthn.not_authenticated: Authentication required. Please sign in again.
factor.webauthn.internal_error: An internal error occurred. Please try again.
factor.webauthn.not_registered: No security key or passkey is registered for this account.
factor.webauthn.no_registration_state: The registration session has expired. Please try again.
factor.webauthn.registration_failed: The server rejected this authenticator. Please try again or contact your administrator.
